---
layout: default
title: "Parliamentary Privilege Disputes and Opposition Challenges to Election Commissio"
date: 2026-06-30T11:25:20.587525+00:00
summary: "Congress moves against the Defence Minister, while the INDIA bloc contests the Election Commission's processes amid ongoing parliamentary and policy debates"
run_time_ist: "4:55PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 4:55PM</p>


## India National Politics

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Privilege motion:</strong> The Congress party has submitted a breach of privilege notice against Defence Minister Rajnath Singh, alleging he misled the Lok Sabha regarding military casualties in &#x27;Op Sindoor&#x27;.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I10</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Legislative updates:</strong> Mallikarjun Kharge has officially taken his oath as a Rajya Sabha member, administered by Chairman C.P. Radhakrishnan.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiwAFBVV95cUxPVDlScHFfOTVvX0h0Yjl4Nm0teFlFekVOV044c3RDQUNRRll2djFYQWM5TFVTNWxwN09OU3FqZmpGXzZVMndSTS1QbkFlbnlaS1F6V0I3LTZfdDFxVHM0T3VkbFN0WVNSWDVhTDBfaGlkNU5ldlpDakVQT2I0S0lLcEN1NExGTVBaTzVwdUtETi0wU3hnX2h6VXdzMUZydGd0Qk12MjVEUnY5U0VidHo2YktNdzFHVFREYWd1aVIxbHc?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirgFBVV95cUxNLVkzVjRKNkd6eGZKZ1N2YS1iYTJnOWtMdzcwaHM4VVpVLUFDenFseFlxbzRxc0EzVVloOFgzOVVvNzRJa1hKak84RVVDYTNiSGp5blJ4TzhsaWREMmJOQjFqRkRYVnpZdWdMcmdRZ1ozczBkV216alF3LV9BVGZDOUtneTZESFNDRUNaa01BNmNZbTdvbHN3cWRaUGtPbkJpZTdKSnhxZWN4TVc0cXc?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a></span></li>
</ul>

## Policy and Institutions

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Election Commission dispute:</strong> The INDIA bloc, supported by 23 parties including AAP and DMK, has written to the Chief Justice of India to challenge the Election Commission’s SIR process, a move the BJP has dismissed as a mask for electoral defeats.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W10</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W11</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Ethanol policy:</strong> The Union government informed the Supreme Court that E20 ethanol blending remains experimental, with the full impact assessment expected by 2027.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W5</a></span></li>
</ul>
